A_LIANG_NOOB.description: You have [blue]{NoDeathTimes}[/blue] total resurrection charges, and you grow stronger each time you revive! After reviving, you gain Max HP whenever you take damage. Every resurrection grants extra [blue]{Power}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold], [blue]{Power}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold], and {Energy:energyIcons()}.
A_LIANG_NOOB.flavor: [red]You think I’m weak? Spit it out![/red]
A_LIANG_NOOB.title: Permafrost
